tempoNotation.self-selected: natural cadence appropriate to the activity

exercises.name: 90/90 hip switches
instructions: Move slowly into a comfortable range.
Use controlled breathing.
Avoid forcing the end position.
Repeat with smooth, pain-free motion.
safetyNotes: Use a pain-free range of motion.
Stop if sharp pain, dizziness, or unusual symptoms occur.
Reduce load or choose a listed substitution when technique cannot be maintained.
exercises.sourceCue: Move through the hips without forcing range.

exercises.name: Ab wheel or dead bug
instructions: Brace as though preparing for a light punch.
Keep ribs and pelvis stacked.
Move only through the intended joints.
Stop before the lower back arches or torso rotates.
safetyNotes: Use a pain-free range of motion.
Stop if sharp pain, dizziness, or unusual symptoms occur.
Reduce load or choose a listed substitution when technique cannot be maintained.
exercises.sourceCue: Exhale, lock ribs down, and move without spinal extension.

exercises.name: Alternating curl + close-grip push-up
instructions: Set the shoulder blades down and back.
Lower the load under control to a consistent touch point.
Keep wrists stacked over elbows.
Press while maintaining full-body tension.
safetyNotes: Use a pain-free range of motion.
Stop if sharp pain, dizziness, or unusual symptoms occur.
Reduce load or choose a listed substitution when technique cannot be maintained.
exercises.sourceCue: Keep reps clean and continuous.

exercises.name: Alternating dumbbell curl
instructions: Keep the upper arm quiet.
Curl without swinging the torso.
Squeeze at the top.
Lower fully under control.
coachingCues: Keep tension on the target muscles.
safetyNotes: Use a pain-free range of motion.
Stop if sharp pain, dizziness, or unusual symptoms occur.
Reduce load or choose a listed substitution when technique cannot be maintained.
exercises.sourceCue: Keep elbows still.

exercises.name: Back squat or front squat
instructions: Set feet securely and brace before descending.
Lower under control while keeping the whole foot planted.
Keep knees tracking with the toes.
Drive through the floor and finish tall without overextending.
commonMistakes: Losing the brace at the bottom
safetyNotes: Use a pain-free range of motion.
Stop if sharp pain, dizziness, or unusual symptoms occur.
Reduce load or choose a listed substitution when technique cannot be maintained.
exercises.sourceCue: Brace before descending and keep the whole foot rooted.

exercises.name: Barbell bench press
instructions: Set the shoulder blades down and back.
Lower the load under control to a consistent touch point.
Keep wrists stacked over elbows.
Press while maintaining full-body tension.
safetyNotes: Use a pain-free range of motion.
Stop if sharp pain, dizziness, or unusual symptoms occur.
Reduce load or choose a listed substitution when technique cannot be maintained.
exercises.sourceCue: Pin shoulder blades, touch low chest, drive feet through the floor.

exercises.name: Bench press or weighted push-up
instructions: Set the shoulder blades down and back.
Lower the load under control to a consistent touch point.
Keep wrists stacked over elbows.
Press while maintaining full-body tension.
safetyNotes: Use a pain-free range of motion.
Stop if sharp pain, dizziness, or unusual symptoms occur.
Reduce load or choose a listed substitution when technique cannot be maintained.

exercises.name: Bike, rower, sled, or hill intervals
exercises.displayName: Bike, rower, sled, or hill intervals
instructions: Start at a sustainable pace.
Maintain relaxed shoulders and rhythmic breathing.
Keep effort within the prescribed RPE or heart-rate zone.
Finish feeling capable of continuing.
commonMistakes: Using poor posture as fatigue rises
safetyNotes: Use a pain-free range of motion.
Stop if sharp pain, dizziness, or unusual symptoms occur.
Reduce load or choose a listed substitution when technique cannot be maintained.
exercises.sourceCue: Finish with the same mechanics you started with.

exercises.name: Carry
instructions: Stand tall with ribs stacked over pelvis.
Crush the handles and keep shoulders level.
Walk with short, controlled steps.
Breathe behind the brace without leaning.
commonMistakes: Leaning toward or away from the load
safetyNotes: Use a pain-free range of motion.
Stop if sharp pain, dizziness, or unusual symptoms occur.
Reduce load or choose a listed substitution when technique cannot be maintained.

instructions: Set the torso and keep the ribs down.

Stop if sharp pain, dizziness, or unusual symptoms occur.
Reduce load or choose a listed substitution when technique cannot be maintained.

exercises.name: Secondary press
instructions: Set the shoulder blades down and back.
Lower the load under control to a consistent touch point.
Keep wrists stacked over elbows.
Press while maintaining full-body tension.
safetyNotes: Use a pain-free range of motion.
Stop if sharp pain, dizziness, or unusual symptoms occur.
Reduce load or choose a listed substitution when technique cannot be maintained.
exercises.sourceCue: Control the eccentric.

exercises.name: Secondary pull
instructions: Set the torso and keep the ribs down.
Initiate by moving the shoulder blade, then the elbow.
Pull toward the lower ribs.
Pause briefly before returning under control.
safetyNotes: Use a pain-free range of motion.
Stop if sharp pain, dizziness, or unusual symptoms occur.
Reduce load or choose a listed substitution when technique cannot be maintained.
exercises.sourceCue: Finish with the back, not momentum.

exercises.name: Side plank
instructions: Brace as though preparing for a light punch.
Keep ribs and pelvis stacked.
Move only through the intended joints.
Stop before the lower back arches or torso rotates.
safetyNotes: Use a pain-free range of motion.
Stop if sharp pain, dizziness, or unusual symptoms occur.
Reduce load or choose a listed substitution when technique cannot be maintained.
exercises.sourceCue: Make a straight line from ear through ankle.

exercises.name: Single-leg Romanian deadlift
instructions: Brace with ribs stacked over pelvis.
Push the hips back while maintaining a neutral spine.
Keep the load close to the body.
Drive the floor away and finish by squeezing the glutes.
safetyNotes: Use a pain-free range of motion.
Stop if sharp pain, dizziness, or unusual symptoms occur.
Reduce load or choose a listed substitution when technique cannot be maintained.
exercises.sourceCue: Keep hips square and reach the free heel backward.

exercises.name: Single-leg or hinge accessory
instructions: Set a stable starting position.
Move through a controlled, pain-free range.
Maintain appropriate breathing and bracing.
Stop the set when technique begins to break down.
coachingCues: Keep tension on the target muscles.
safetyNotes: Use a pain-free range of motion.
Stop if sharp pain, dizziness, or unusual symptoms occur.
Reduce load or choose a listed substitution when technique cannot be maintained.
exercises.sourceCue: Own balance and range.

exercises.name: Split squat
instructions: Set feet securely and brace before descending.
Lower under control while keeping the whole foot planted.
Keep knees tracking with the toes.
Drive through the floor and finish tall without overextending.
commonMistakes: Losing the brace at the bottom
safetyNotes: Use a pain-free range of motion.
Stop if sharp pain, dizziness, or unusual symptoms occur.
Reduce load or choose a listed substitution when technique cannot be maintained.
exercises.sourceCue: Own the range before adding load.

exercises.name: Standing calf raise
instructions: Use a stable base.
Rise through the ball of the foot.
Pause at the top.
Lower into a comfortable stretch.
coachingCues: Keep tension on the target muscles.
safetyNotes: Use a pain-free range of motion.
Stop if sharp pain, dizziness, or unusual symptoms occur.
Reduce load or choose a listed substitution when technique cannot be maintained.
exercises.sourceCue: Pause in the stretch and finish tall on the big toe.

exercises.name: Standing overhead press
instructions: Brace the trunk and squeeze the glutes.
Start with forearms vertical.
Press overhead without flaring the ribs.
Finish with the arms aligned beside the ears.
commonMistakes: Failing to reach a stable lockout
safetyNotes: Use a pain-free range of motion.
Stop if sharp pain, dizziness, or unusual symptoms occur.
Reduce load or choose a listed substitution when technique cannot be maintained.
exercises.sourceCue: Squeeze glutes, stack ribs, and finish with biceps by ears.

exercises.name: Suitcase carry
instructions: Stand tall with ribs stacked over pelvis.
Crush the handles and keep shoulders level.
Walk with short, controlled steps.
Breathe behind the brace without leaning.
commonMistakes: Leaning toward or away from the load
safetyNotes: Use a pain-free range of motion.
Stop if sharp pain, dizziness, or unusual symptoms occur.
Reduce load or choose a listed substitution when technique cannot be maintained.
exercises.sourceCue: Resist leaning toward the weight.

exercises.name: Trap-bar deadlift or Romanian deadlift
instructions: Brace with ribs stacked over pelvis.
Push the hips back while maintaining a neutral spine.
Keep the load close to the body.
Drive the floor away and finish by squeezing the glutes.
safetyNotes: Use a pain-free range of motion.
Stop if sharp pain, dizziness, or unusual symptoms occur.
Reduce load or choose a listed substitution when technique cannot be maintained.
exercises.sourceCue: Use repeatable technique and stop before grinding.

exercises.name: Trap-bar deadlift or conventional deadlift
instructions: Brace with ribs stacked over pelvis.
Push the hips back while maintaining a neutral spine.
Keep the load close to the body.
Drive the floor away and finish by squeezing the glutes.
safetyNotes: Use a pain-free range of motion.
Stop if sharp pain, dizziness, or unusual symptoms occur.
Reduce load or choose a listed substitution when technique cannot be maintained.
exercises.sourceCue: Push the floor away and finish tall without leaning back.

exercises.name: Weighted pull-up or lat pulldown
instructions: Begin from a long-arm position.
Pull the shoulder blades down before bending the elbows.
Drive elbows toward the ribs.
Return to full reach without losing control.
safetyNotes: Use a pain-free range of motion.
Stop if sharp pain, dizziness, or unusual symptoms occur.
Reduce load or choose a listed substitution when technique cannot be maintained.
exercises.sourceCue: Drive elbows down and keep the neck long.

exercises.name: Weighted pull-up or pulldown
instructions: Begin from a long-arm position.
Pull the shoulder blades down before bending the elbows.
Drive elbows toward the ribs.
Return to full reach without losing control.
safetyNotes: Use a pain-free range of motion.
Stop if sharp pain, dizziness, or unusual symptoms occur.
Reduce load or choose a listed substitution when technique cannot be maintained.
exercises.sourceCue: Use repeatable technique and stop before grinding.

exercises.name: Zone 2 bike, row, or incline walk
exercises.displayName: Zone 2 bike, row, or incline walk
instructions: Start at a sustainable pace.
Maintain relaxed shoulders and rhythmic breathing.
Keep effort within the prescribed RPE or heart-rate zone.
Finish feeling capable of continuing.
commonMistakes: Using poor posture as fatigue rises
safetyNotes: Use a pain-free range of motion.
Stop if sharp pain, dizziness, or unusual symptoms occur.
Reduce load or choose a listed substitution when technique cannot be maintained.
exercises.sourceCue: Breathe rhythmically and finish more energized.
